# tempo-memos — machine-readable hints

Audience
  Notes about Tempo (payments-focused Layer 1 blockchain). Written primarily for a Japanese-speaking audience (e.g. X Spaces prep).

Human-readable overview
  README.md (Japanese) — project description and editorial rules.

Agent checklist (Cursor / automation)
  AGENTS.md (English) — imperative rules when editing this repo; keeps README narrative short.

Article language
  All memo bodies live under docs/ as Japanese Markdown (*.md). Filenames are descriptive English-style slugs (e.g. docs/subscriptions.md, docs/payment-lanes.md). Optional subfolders under docs/ are allowed.

Index of Japanese articles (*.md)
  When you add a memo, append its relative path from repo root here so tools can discover it.

  - README.md — overview and conventions (Japanese), repository root
  - docs/subscriptions.md — Subscriptions on Tempo (Japanese summary)
  - docs/access-keys.md — Tempo access keys (Japanese memo)

Official references (verify facts here when unsure)
  https://tempo.xyz/
  https://github.com/tempoxyz

Assistant notes
  Do not invent Tempo protocol details; cite official docs or leave gaps.
  New memo files belong under docs/*.md and must be listed under “Index of Japanese articles” above.
  Create memo filenames from topic keywords (hyphenated English is fine); write body text in Japanese.
